title: 思い出、並んで、おなかに入れて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I arrive at the summer training site together with Special Week. Once
we get there, however...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Blegh... I-it's so hot...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I know I need to do this... in order to win... But it's just way too hot...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The heat is getting to her head. I need to figure out how to cheer her
up...
choice_data_list:
How about we eat something delicious at the
festival later tonight?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Delicious... festival food?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
They... they have baked potatoes with butter, right?! It's a festival
staple!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! I think I'm ready to start training! Let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Special Week all fired up and ready to go, she blasts through
her entire training regimen. Afterwards...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Wooow! There are so many different stalls... So many people too. I
don't think I've ever been to such a packed festival.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Where do we even begin?! Oh, I see a baked potato stall! Let's start
with that!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Phew... That was delicious! Baked potatoes with butter never
disappoint, no matter the festival!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
So where do we go next? That Umamusume sponge cake over there
looks—oh!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Grass and the others are here too! Do you mind if I say hi to them
really quickly?
choice_data_list: Not at all. Take your time.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Thank you! I'll be right back!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (Thud!)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oops! I'm sorry! I didn't mean to bump—oof! So many people!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week gets caught in the crowd, unable to move due to the
sheer density of people on the streets.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I lead Special Week down a path that isn't so packed.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Phew! W-we made it! Thanks for saving me back there, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I will!
Hey, Grass! Over heeere!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While I wait for Special Week to finish her business, I decide to buy
some Umamusume sponge cake to try out.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
See ya!
...Sorry to keep you waiting.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wait a second... Sniff... sniff... I smell something sweet. That bag... Is it what I think it is?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! It's the Umamusume sponge cake!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You got it for me, didn't you?! Oh, you really shouldn't have!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I wanna get you something too! What to get, what to get... Hm? That
stall over there...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! I know just what to give you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week hands me her gift, and we head to the beach to enjoy
each other's treats.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Mmmm... That sponge cake was so good! It took only three seconds
to make it disappear!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Heheh... Adding "Umamusume" to things makes them taste different
somehow! They didn't do stuff like this back home, that's for sure.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
How about yours? Your shaved ice was made using milk from
Hokkaido!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That's good! Oh, take your time though. If you eat too much at once,
you'll get brain freeze.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Besides, I want you savor the taste of my hometown!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! Come to think of it, why is festival food so good?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I mean... Take yakisoba or baked potatoes, for example. They're
super simple everyday foods! Yet they still somehow taste absolutely
amazing!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
My mom always wondered why too. But... I think I've figured out the
reason why it tastes the way it does.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Festivals are a place of fun and happiness! The food is amazing
because you get to share it with the people you care about most!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh... I hope my mom's doing okay...
choice_data_list: You sure do miss her a lot, don't you?
You sure do miss her a lot, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Well, yeah... It's hard not to during times like these.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But those feelings of loneliness and sadness no longer get to me
because...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I love it here! I love spending every day here at Tracen Academy!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm a regular at a ramen shop, I've found new places I love visiting,
and I've made so many close friends!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: That's probably why the sponge cake tasted so good too.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It took a lot of courage for me to step out of my comfort zone and
come to the academy, but I'm really glad I did—I was able to find an
amazing trainer!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... I'll do my part and try my best to train hard tomorrow too!
Now that I've filled my stomach, all I need to do is get a good night's
rest, and—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Wait, what time is it now?! We have to get back before they lock us
out!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
B-but you aren't done with your shaved ice yet! I want you to take
your time eating such a delicacy...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Maybe if I help you finish the dessert—no, what am I even saying?!
That just makes it look like I want some of your food!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? R-really? Are you sure? ...Yaaaay! Leave it to me!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: All right, then... I'm digging in! ♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Mmmmm! The ice is so crunchy... and delicious!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
The milk... tastes just like the milk... I had back in
Hokkaido—Hawaaaa?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: O-owww... My head... It hurts... Brain... is freezing...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Self-inflicted though the pain may have been, I lend my shoulder to
the ailing Special Week and we somehow manage to make it back in
time.
